'''鈭歯-dh-ch''' ('''kanadhach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:loave|loave]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-dh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loave|loave]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-dh-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kanadhach
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinadhach|thinadhach]] || [[word:jinadhach|jinadhach]] || [[word:shinadhach|shinadhach]] || [[word:kinadhach|kinadhach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunadhach|thuthunadhach]] || [[word:jujunadhach|jujunadhach]] || [[word:shushunadhach|shushunadhach]] || [[word:kukunadhach|kukunadhach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunadhach|thunadhach]] || [[word:junadhach|junadhach]] || [[word:shunadhach|shunadhach]] || [[word:kunadhach|kunadhach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunadhach|thunadhach]] || [[word:junadhach|junadhach]] || [[word:shunadhach|shunadhach]] || [[word:kunadhach|kunadhach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenadhach|thenadhach]] || [[word:jenadhach|jenadhach]] || [[word:shenadhach|shenadhach]] || [[word:kenadhach|kenadhach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonadhach|thothonadhach]] || [[word:jojonadhach|jojonadhach]] || [[word:shoshonadhach|shoshonadhach]] || [[word:kokonadhach|kokonadhach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonadhach|thonadhach]] || [[word:jonadhach|jonadhach]] || [[word:shonadhach|shonadhach]] || [[word:konadhach|konadhach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonadhach|thonadhach]] || [[word:jonadhach|jonadhach]] || [[word:shonadhach|shonadhach]] || [[word:konadhach|konadhach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nadhach|nadhach]] || [[word:nadhach|nadhach]] || [[word:nadhach|nadhach]] || [[word:nadhach|nadhach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nadhach|nadhach]] || [[word:nadhach|nadhach]] || [[word:nadhach|nadhach]] || [[word:nadhach|nadhach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nadhach|nadhach]] || [[word:nadhach|nadhach]] || [[word:nadhach|nadhach]] || [[word:nadhach|nadhach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nadhach|nadhach]] || [[word:nadhach|nadhach]] || [[word:nadhach|nadhach]] || [[word:nadhach|nadhach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙nadhach|th忙nadhach]] || [[word:j忙nadhach|j忙nadhach]] || [[word:sh忙nadhach|sh忙nadhach]] || [[word:k忙nadhach|k忙nadhach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanadhach|thathanadhach]] || [[word:jajanadhach|jajanadhach]] || [[word:shashanadhach|shashanadhach]] || [[word:kakanadhach|kakanadhach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanadhach|thanadhach]] || [[word:janadhach|janadhach]] || [[word:shanadhach|shanadhach]] || [[word:kanadhach|kanadhach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanadhach|thanadhach]] || [[word:janadhach|janadhach]] || [[word:shanadhach|shanadhach]] || [[word:kanadhach|kanadhach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanadhach|shanadhach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanadhach|goshanadhach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanadhach|gokishanadhach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanadhachn眉|shanadhachn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanadhachnkn眉|goshanadhachnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanadhachn眉|gokishanadhachn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanadhachsh毛|shanadhachsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanadhachnksh毛|goshanadhachnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanadhachsh毛|gokishanadhachsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanadhachro|shanadhachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanadhachnkro|goshanadhachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanadhachro|gokishanadhachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanadhachmu|shanadhachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanadhachnkmu|goshanadhachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanadhachmu|gokishanadhachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanadhachsher|shanadhachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanadhachnksher|goshanadhachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanadhachsher|gokishanadhachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanadhachng|shanadhachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanadhachnkng|goshanadhachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanadhachng|gokishanadhachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanadhachya|shanadhachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanadhachnkya|goshanadhachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanadhachya|gokishanadhachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanadhachyam|shanadhachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanadhachnkyam|goshanadhachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanadhachyam|gokishanadhachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanadhachn眉sh毛|shanadhachn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanadhachnkn眉sh毛|goshanadhachnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanadhachn眉sh毛|gokishanadhachn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanadhachn眉ro|shanadhachn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanadhachnkn眉ro|goshanadhachnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanadhachn眉ro|gokishanadhachn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanadhachn眉mu|shanadhachn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanadhachnkn眉mu|goshanadhachnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanadhachn眉mu|gokishanadhachn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanadhachsh毛n眉|shanadhachsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanadhachnksh毛n眉|goshanadhachnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanadhachsh毛n眉|gokishanadhachsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanadhachsh毛ro|shanadhachsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanadhachnksh毛ro|goshanadhachnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanadhachsh毛ro|gokishanadhachsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanadhachsh毛mu|shanadhachsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanadhachnksh毛mu|goshanadhachnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanadhachsh毛mu|gokishanadhachsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanadhachron眉|shanadhachron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanadhachnkron眉|goshanadhachnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanadhachron眉|gokishanadhachron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanadhachrosh毛|shanadhachrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanadhachnkrosh毛|goshanadhachnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanadhachrosh毛|gokishanadhachrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanadhachromu|shanadhachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanadhachnkromu|goshanadhachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanadhachromu|gokishanadhachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanadhachmun眉|shanadhachmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanadhachnkmun眉|goshanadhachnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanadhachmun眉|gokishanadhachmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanadhachmush毛|shanadhachmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanadhachnkmush毛|goshanadhachnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanadhachmush毛|gokishanadhachmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanadhachmuro|shanadhachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanadhachnkmuro|goshanadhachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanadhachmuro|gokishanadhachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
